title: × dactylocamptis lamarquei
intro: × Dactylocamptis lamarquei is a hybrid plant species within the orchid family, specifically a cross between Dactylorhiza maculata and Coeloglossum viride. This plant is believed to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to act as an anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial agent. The health benefits of × Dactylocamptis lamarquei are not well-documented, but it is thought to have potential in treating various health conditions such as wounds, infections, and allergies. In herbal preparations, the plant's underground parts are typically used to make infusions, decoctions, or tinctures for medicinal purposes.
